name: Depression
description: Major depressive disorder and persistent depression.

name: Anxiety
description: Generalized anxiety, social anxiety, and panic disorder.

name: ADHD
description: Attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder in teens and adults.

name: Alcohol Use Disorder
description: Evidence-based treatment for problem drinking at any severity.

name: Opioid Use Disorder
description: Buprenorphine treatment and counseling for OUD.

name: Stimulant Use Disorder
description: Treatment for cocaine, meth, and prescription stimulant misuse.

name: Gambling Disorder
description: The only non-substance behavioral addiction in the DSM-5.
